title: Primary election results across America
shortDescription: It's a consequential week for the midterms.

title: Georgia election results: Latest on races for House, Senate, governor
shortDescription: The Peach State's midterm elections are shaping up.

title: Mark Cuban partners with Donald Trump after backing Kamala Harris
shortDescription: Donald Trump had billionaire Mark Cuban at an event announcing an expansion of TrumpRx to lower drug prices. The 'Shark Tank' judge backed Kamala Harris.

title: Oregon election results: Latest on races for House, Senate, governor
shortDescription: Oregon sets its November midterms ballot.

title: Idaho election results: Latest on races for House, Senate, governor
shortDescription: Idaho's November ballot is shaping up.

title: Trump's rating sinks but his grip on GOP holds. Why? Ask Tom Massie.
shortDescription: Kentucky Rep. Massie is the latest Republican to suffer the wrath of Trump even as the president's ratings sink into dangerous territory for the GOP.

title: Alabama election results: Latest on races for House, Senate, governor
shortDescription: The races to watch in Alabama are shaping up.

title: Pennsylvania election results: Latest on races for House, governor
shortDescription: The Keystone State voted in all 17 congressional districts.

title: Kentucky election results: Latest on House, Senate primary races
shortDescription: Who will be on the November ballot in Kentucky? Here's a rundown.

title: Massie defeated in GOP primary
shortDescription: Rep. Thomas Massie was defeated in the Republican primary in Kentucky's 4th Congressional District by Trump-endorsed challenger Ed Gallrein.

title: Senate advances measure to end war in Iran
shortDescription: In a blow to President Trump, the Senate moved forward for the first time with a measure to end the war in Iran.

title: Senate Republicans seethe, Democrats crow as Trump snubs John Cornyn in Texas
shortDescription: One Republican senator told reporters that President Trump's decision to endorse Ken Paxton in Texas puts a Senate seat in jeopardy.

title: Voters cast ballots for key Kentucky house seat
shortDescription: Voters in the Kentucky's 4th Congressional District are facing a choice between Rep. Thomas Massie and challenger Ed Gallrein.

title: Lawmakers gather for annual picnic at White House: See photos
shortDescription: The annual bipartisan picnic brings together White House staff, members of Congress and their families at the White House.

title: After primary loss, Bill Cassidy bucks Trump, votes to end Iran war
shortDescription: On the heels of losing his primary election, Republican Sen. Bill Cassidy immediately bucked the leader of his party.

title: Trump’s $1.776 billion 'anti-weaponization' fund outrages critics
shortDescription: President Trump's critics are fuming after the DOJ announced a $1.776 billion fund that could compensate Trump allies, including Jan. 6 defendants.

title: Donald Trump Jr. wedding plans could happen soon
shortDescription: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson could wed as soon as Memorial Day weekend, according to reports. Here’s what we know.

title: New deal bars IRS from auditing Trump, his family and businesses
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has been feuding with the IRS for many years over audits into whether he and his business empire paid enough taxes.

title: Trump tours White House ballroom construction site, shares new details
shortDescription: The president offered an impromptu tour of the ballroom construction site and talked about security and additional features.

title: Trump, WHO chief say they are 'concerned' about Ebola outbreak
shortDescription: Trump and health officials expressed concern about the deadly outbreak that has grown to more than 500 suspected cases in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

title: Democrats grill Blanche on new crime victims fund
shortDescription: Democrats questioned Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche on a new $1.77 billion fund to help victims of "lawfare and weaponization."

title: Trump says strike on Iran was an hour away
shortDescription: Trump says he was an hour away from ordering strikes on Iran, describing last-minute talks and warning action could still come.

title: Trump expresses confidence on a potential Cuba deal
shortDescription: Donald Trump says he is confident a deal with Cuba is possible and highlights support for Cuban Americans in Miami and across Florida.

title: Trump-backed candidates advance in Kentucky, Georgia: Recap
shortDescription: President Donald Trump had repeatedly criticized Republican Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky – and backed his challenger in a closely watched primary.

title: See when polls close in each state having elections on May 19
shortDescription: Voters in six states will determine the nominees for the November general election in primaries on May 19. Here's which ones and when you can vote.

title: Trump backs Texas attorney general in key Senate runoff that divided Republicans
shortDescription: President Trump made his endorsement in the Texas Republican primary runoff after staying neutral for months.
